{{Quote|We don't like you any more than we ever did. We just never saw anything like that before. Not with Boba Fett, that is…|A Harf speaking to Bossk|<ref name="HM" />}}
The '''Harf''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with an elongated snout and massive arms. They had goggle-like eyes that shined red. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], a [[Unidentified Harf patron|drunken Harf]] was present in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]] when the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had a face-off. Bossk won, with Fett paying him a large number of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="HM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Harf were created by [[K. W. Jeter]] for his novel ''[[Hard Merchandise]]'', published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1999]] as book three of ''[[The Bounty Hunter Wars]]'' trilogy. They later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published by [[Del Rey]] in [[2008]].
